requirement_topic.en: EMC and Radio Equipment — ECA approval for wireless features (no CE marking)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容与无线电设备——无线功能须ECA许可（不适用CE标志）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁兼容與無線電設備——無線功能須ECA許可（不適用CE標誌）

summary.en: Ethiopia does not use CE marking. For lithium products that incorporate wireless functions (for example a power bank with Bluetooth, Wi-Fi, or wireless charging, or a battery built into a wireless device), the Ethiopian Communications Authority (ECA) administers type approval / authorisation of radio and telecom equipment. General electromagnetic-compatibility expectations are met through the relevant IEC-based ES standards adopted by ESA rather than through an EU EMC Directive. Where the product is regulated, CACEA / Ministry of Trade conformity assessment and import inspection apply on entry, and radio-bearing devices additionally require ECA approval handled through the in-country importer.
summary.zh: 埃塞俄比亚不使用CE标志。对于含无线功能的锂产品（例如带蓝牙、Wi-Fi或无线充电的移动电源，或内置于无线设备中的电池），由埃塞俄比亚通信管理局（ECA）负责无线电及电信设备的型号核准/授权。一般电磁兼容要求通过ESA采纳的相关IEC基础ES标准满足，而非通过欧盟EMC指令。在产品受监管时，入境时适用CACEA/贸易部的合格评定与进口检验，含无线电的设备另须经在地进口商办理ECA许可。
summary.zht: 衣索比亞不使用CE標誌。對於含無線功能的鋰產品（例如帶藍牙、Wi-Fi或無線充電的行動電源，或內置於無線設備中的電池），由衣索比亞通訊管理局（ECA）負責無線電及電信設備的型號核准/授權。一般電磁兼容要求透過ESA採納的相關IEC基礎ES標準滿足，而非透過歐盟EMC指令。在產品受監管時，入境時適用CACEA/貿易部的合格評定與進口檢驗，含無線電的設備另須經在地進口商辦理ECA許可。

standards_or_laws: Ethiopian Communications Authority (ECA) — type approval / authorisation of radio and telecom equipment
IEC-based ES standards adopted by ESA for EMC characteristics (no EU EMC Directive applies)
CACEA / Ministry of Trade — conformity assessment and import inspection for regulated products

summary.en: In China, electromagnetic compatibility and radio approval are handled through GB EMC standards and the SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China) type approval for radio-transmitting equipment, plus CCC for many finished electronic products. SRRC approval and CCC are China-domestic schemes and are not recognised by the Ethiopian Communications Authority, which issues its own radio-equipment authorisation. EMC test data generated to IEC/CISPR bases in China can support an Ethiopian dossier, but the approval itself must be obtained from ECA.
summary.zh: 在中国，电磁兼容与无线电核准通过GB EMC标准及SRRC（国家无线电管理）对无线电发射设备的型号核准处理，许多电子终端产品另需CCC。SRRC核准和CCC属中国国内制度，不被埃塞俄比亚通信管理局承认，后者签发自有的无线电设备授权。在中国依IEC/CISPR基础生成的EMC测试数据可支持埃塞俄比亚的申报材料，但授权本身须向ECA取得。
summary.zht: 在中國，電磁兼容與無線電核准透過GB EMC標準及SRRC（國家無線電管理）對無線電發射設備的型號核准處理，許多電子終端產品另需CCC。SRRC核准和CCC屬中國國內制度，不被衣索比亞通訊管理局承認，後者簽發自有的無線電設備授權。在中國依IEC/CISPR基礎生成的EMC測試數據可支持衣索比亞的申報材料，但授權本身須向ECA取得。

standards_or_laws: GB/T EMC standards (CISPR/IEC-based) for emissions and immunity
SRRC type approval for radio-transmitting equipment (China-domestic)
CCC scheme (where applicable to the finished product)

gap.en: There is no CE marking and no EU EMC Directive in Ethiopia, so exporters do not apply a CE-style self-declaration. The real gaps are: (1) any wireless feature triggers a separate ECA radio-equipment approval, which China SRRC approval does not satisfy; (2) EMC expectations follow IEC/CISPR-based ES standards via ESA rather than EU harmonised standards, so test reports should be in IEC/CISPR format; (3) all of this is cleared on import via CACEA inspection and the importer, not by affixing a mark at the factory. China-generated IEC/CISPR EMC data can be reused, but the ECA authorisation is a fresh, in-market step.
gap.zh: 埃塞俄比亚没有CE标志、也没有欧盟EMC指令，因此出口商不进行CE式自我声明。真正的差距是：（1）任何无线功能都会触发单独的ECA无线电设备许可，中国SRRC核准不能满足；（2）EMC要求通过ESA依IEC/CISPR的ES标准执行，而非欧盟协调标准，因此测试报告应为IEC/CISPR格式；（3）上述均在进口时经CACEA检验及进口商完成，而非在工厂加贴标志。中国生成的IEC/CISPR EMC数据可复用，但ECA授权是一项全新的在地步骤。
gap.zht: 衣索比亞沒有CE標誌、也沒有歐盟EMC指令，因此出口商不進行CE式自我聲明。真正的差距是：（1）任何無線功能都會觸發單獨的ECA無線電設備許可，中國SRRC核准不能滿足；（2）EMC要求透過ESA依IEC/CISPR的ES標準執行，而非歐盟協調標準，因此測試報告應為IEC/CISPR格式；（3）上述均在進口時經CACEA檢驗及進口商完成，而非在工廠加貼標誌。中國生成的IEC/CISPR EMC數據可複用，但ECA授權是一項全新的在地步驟。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for wireless devices — ECA radio-equipment approval required where the product has radio functions; EMC via IEC/CISPR-based ES standards; no CE marking and no EU EMC Directive in Ethiopia
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — SRRC type approval required for radio-transmitting equipment; CCC and GB EMC standards apply to many finished electronic products in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Ethiopia does not use CE marking; EMC follows IEC/CISPR-based ES standards via ESA, and any wireless feature requires a separate radio-equipment approval from the Ethiopian Communications Authority (ECA), which China SRRC approval does not satisfy. Regulated products are cleared via CACEA / Ministry of Trade import inspection through the importer. China-generated IEC/CISPR EMC test data can support the dossier, but the ECA authorisation is a fresh in-market step.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 埃塞俄比亚不使用CE标志；EMC通过ESA依IEC/CISPR的ES标准执行，任何无线功能须取得埃塞俄比亚通信管理局（ECA）的单独无线电设备许可，中国SRRC核准不能满足。受监管产品经CACEA/贸易部进口检验由进口商办理放行。中国生成的IEC/CISPR EMC测试数据可支持申报材料，但ECA授权是一项全新的在地步骤。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 衣索比亞不使用CE標誌；EMC透過ESA依IEC/CISPR的ES標準執行，任何無線功能須取得衣索比亞通訊管理局（ECA）的單獨無線電設備許可，中國SRRC核准不能滿足。受監管產品經CACEA/貿易部進口檢驗由進口商辦理放行。中國生成的IEC/CISPR EMC測試數據可支持申報材料，但ECA授權是一項全新的在地步驟。
